svg.title: World of Protocols
svg.desc: A comprehensive protocol relationship diagram showing 274 protocols organized by OSI layer and domain.
svg.text: 274 protocols organized by layer and domain -- from physical bus to application layer

text.style: font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; fill: #888;

svg.text: Click any protocol to view its documentation on GitHub

text.style: font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; fill: #333;
font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; fill: #333;

g.text: Application | Security | Transport | Network | Tunnel | Data Link | Wireless | Telecom | Physical/Bus | Data/HPC

text.style: font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; fill: #888;
font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; fill: #aaa;

g.text: Click any protocol box to view its documentation
